mapper.select: SELECT s.id, u.name AS studentName, c.course_name AS courseName, s.score, s.exam_type AS examType, se.semester_name AS semesterName, s.create_time FROM score s LEFT JOIN user u ON s.student_id = u.id LEFT JOIN course c ON s.course_id = c.id LEFT JOIN semester se ON s.semester_id = se.id
